series_metadata.series_title: Real Estate Disciplinary Files - Public Records
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule pertains to records received by the Division regarding a complaint against a person engaging in unlicensed activity (ORC 4735.52 & 4764.16) or a complaint against a real estate licensee, a foreign real estate dealer or salesperson or a licensed home inspector. This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, the complaint, records received with the complaint, notice of hearing and charging document, citation letter, proof of service related to the formal hearings or orders, settlement agreements, hearing officer reports, objections to hearing officer reports, transcripts, commission orders, exhibits submitted to the commission for its review in the matter or documents related to any appeals to a court.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper copy is retained disciplinary file is closed at administrative level or upon expiration of appeals, whichever is later. , paper copy is imaged and indexed on computer. Upon confirmation that paper copy was imaged and indexed on computer ; Microform: Any images on microfiche are be retained five years disciplinary file is closed on administrative level or upon expiration of appeals, whichever is later. , image on microfiche is be destroyed. ; Electronic: Images on computer are be retained five years disciplinary file is closed on administrative level or upon expiration of appeals, whichever is later. , image on computer is be destroyed
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
